app.name: MDT AI Reply
app.short_description: AI-powered reply suggestions for MDT support tickets
app.long_description: Generates AI-suggested replies using the MDT knowledge base. Click the button to get a suggested reply, then insert it into your response.
app.installation_instructions:
1. Enter your Railway backend URL (e.g. https://your-app.up.railway.app)
2. Enter the API token (set ZENDESK_APP_TOKEN in your backend config)
3. Install and start using!

apiUrl.label: Backend API URL
apiUrl.helpText: Your MDT Support backend URL (e.g. https://your-app.up.railway.app)

apiToken.label: API Token
apiToken.helpText: The shared secret token for authenticating with the backend
